Name: UMoviePlayerSettings
Description: Implements the settings for the Windows target platform.

Variables.Name: bWaitForMoviesToComplete
Variables.Description: If enabled, The game waits for startup movies to complete even if loading has finished.

Variables.Name: bMoviesAreSkippable
Variables.Description: If enabled, Startup movies can be skipped by the user when a mouse button is pressed.

Variables.Name: StartupMovies
Variables.Description: Movies to play on startup. Note that these must be in your game's GameContentMovies directory.
